title: Help, Result Formatting, Streams, and Terminal Accessibility · Language Lens: Pokedex Go Deterministic Formatting
summary: Commands mix data and prose, errors appear on stdout, help order changes across runs, long records become unreadable, and progress depends on color and cursor motion. Predict the user decision, Go ownership, command state, API contract, resource budget, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pokedex go deterministic formatting increment in screen-reader-friendly deterministic terminal presenter. Learners progress through predic…
objectives: Sort maps and sets, label units, preserve stable field order, and distinguish absent, zero, empty, and unknown values.
Assign data, diagnostics, progress, and usage to deliberate streams and return stable command outcomes or exit statuses.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
